text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of Copano Rickey's debut, she heads
out through a door decked in orange—her lucky
color.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside the paddock she seems as curious as a
child, gazing around and consulting her compass.
But what she's doing is a feng shui routine for the
purpose of shaping one's environment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How can feng shui contribute to winning races?
Soon enough, we will all see.
